mission.title: langflow: Error in DB migration with PostgreSQL for Langflow v0.6
mission.description: Error in DB migration with PostgreSQL for Langflow v0.6. Community-reported issue.

steps.title: Identify langflow troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your langflow installation:
```bash
pip show langflow | grep Version
```
Look for errors during DB migration when using PostgreSQL. The log may suggest running `langflow migration --fix`, but executing this command does not resolve the error.

steps.title: Review langflow configuration
steps.description: When using PostgreSQL as the database for Langflow version 0.6, an error occurs during the DB migration process. The alembic migration scripts had a missing import for the logger module and incorrect error handling during the upgrade process.

steps.title: Apply the fix for DB migration with PostgreSQL
steps.description:
The fix adds the missing logger import in `script.py.mako` and corrects the error handling in the alembic upgrade scripts. Ensure your Docker Compose sets up PostgreSQL correctly:
```yaml
services:
  langflow:
    build: .
    env_file:
      - .env
    ports:
      - "7860:7860"
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_healthy

  db:
    image: postgres:15
    ports:
      - "5432:5432"
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: langflow
      POSTGRES_USER: user
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password
    volumes:
      - ./src/db/data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U user -d postgres"]
      timeout: 20s
      interval: 10s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 30s
```
Upgrade to a langflow version that includes this migration fix.

steps.title: Upgrade langflow to include the fix
steps.description:
Upgrade langflow to a version that includes the migration fix:
```bash
pip install --upgrade langflow
pip show langflow | grep Version
```

steps.title: Confirm the issue is resolved
steps.description: Verify the fix by restarting Langflow and confirming that the DB migration completes successfully with PostgreSQL. Check that no alembic migration errors appear in the logs.

resolution.summary: Added the missing import for the logger module in script.py.mako and fixed the error handling during the upgrade process in the alembic migration scripts, resolving the PostgreSQL migration failure in Langflow v0.6.

prerequisites.description: Python 3.10+ with langflow installed (pip install langflow). Docker and Docker Compose for containerized deployment with PostgreSQL.
